---
title: "Cordelia Elizabeth Yonge"
---

## Cordelia Elizabeth Yonge

**Dates:** (1874-1958)

### Description

third daughter of the Rev. Duke Yonge of Puslinch

### Biography

She married (1903) the Ven. Cyril Price (1866-1943).

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 24 [1896 or earlier]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
